# optimizing-descriptions

> Meta-skill for auditing and rewriting SKILL.md `description` fields per the agentskills.io optimizing-descriptions framework, layered with a two-track trigger policy (Meta = explicit-invoke-only, Project = pushy auto-trigger). Invoke ONLY when the user explicitly asks to "optimize a skill description," "audit descriptions," or "rewrite descriptions per agentskills." Do NOT auto-invoke after every SKILL.md edit; description tuning is a deliberate batch, not a per-edit reflex.

## Install

### APM (recommended)

```bash
apm install HukuKaich0u/agent-kit/skills/meta/optimizing-descriptions
```

Or declare it in `apm.yml` for a reproducible setup:

```yaml
dependencies:
  apm:
    - HukuKaich0u/agent-kit/skills/meta/optimizing-descriptions
```

then run `apm install`.

### Any agentskills.io-compatible agent

This is an [Agent Skills](https://agentskills.io) skill — a portable
`SKILL.md` folder that works with Claude Code, Codex, opencode, Gemini CLI,
Cursor, and other [compatible agents](https://agentskills.io/clients).

With the [`skills`](https://github.com/vercel-labs/skills) CLI (installs into
every detected agent's skills directory):

```bash
npx skills add HukuKaich0u/agent-kit --skill optimizing-descriptions
```

Or copy the folder in directly:

```bash
npx degit HukuKaich0u/agent-kit/skills/meta/optimizing-descriptions ~/.claude/skills/optimizing-descriptions
```

See [SKILL.md](./SKILL.md) for what this skill does and when to use it.
<!-- apm:readme:end -->

# optimizing-descriptions

SKILL.md の `description` を、発火すべきときに発火し余計なときは黙るよう、agentskills.io のフレームワーク + 2-track ポリシー(Meta = 明示 invoke のみ / Project = pushy auto-trigger)で監査・書き直す meta skill です。

Claude / Codex の両方で使う前提で整えています。監査チェックリストと書き換えパターンは [SKILL.md](./SKILL.md) を参照してください。
